retrieval.query_summary: SMC SH+BMS+RTO bullish setup on Boom 1000 Index

cot_signal.summary: Net speculative positioning is flat/neutral for synthetic indices.

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The Boom 1000 Index is currently exhibiting a highly structured bullish reversal setup on the M15 timeframe, which serves as a high-probability counter-trend pullback targeting major HTF liquidity pools. Top-down analysis reveals that while the HTF trend (MN1 down to H1) is strongly BEARISH, the price has recently completed a major liquidity sweep of the D1/H12/H8/H4/H3/H1 sell-side liquidity pools at 13038.256 and 13053.559. Following this sweep, the lower timeframes (M15, M5, M1) have shifted to a BULLISH structure, indicating the initiation of a counter-trend retracement phase. The selected M15 candidate (BOOM 1000 INDEX_SH_BMS_RTO_BULLISH_BULLISH_13067.938_548b6948) represents a textbook 'SH+BMS+FVG+RTO' pattern. It features a clean Stop Hunt (SH) below 13139.571, followed by a Break of Market Structure (BOS) and Change of Character (CHoCH) confirmed higher at 13153.478. The entry zone is nested within the M15 Order Block (13062.222 - 13073.654) and is supported by a clean M15 FVG (13073.654 - 13116.208). We place a LIMIT order at 13067.938 with a structural SL at 13061.0788, just below the OB lower bound. Take Profit targets are constructed structurally: TP1 at 13153.478 (M15 BMS level), TP2 at 13236.315 (H1 swing high), and TP3 at 13281.855 (H1 equal highs), offering an exceptional R:R ratio of 31.19.

htf_bias.notes: HTF trend is strongly bearish, but price has swept major HTF liquidity at the lows, initiating a bullish counter-trend pullback.

mtf_bias.notes: M15 has confirmed a bullish CHoCH and BMS, establishing a valid SH+BMS+FVG+RTO setup.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup

stop_loss.reason: Placed 1.14 pips below the M15 Order Block lower bound of 13062.222 to protect against minor stop hunts while maintaining structural invalidation integrity.

take_profits.basis: M15 BMS/CHoCH level representing the nearest structural liquidity pool.
H1 swing high representing a minor buy-side liquidity pool.
H1 equal highs representing a major buy-side liquidity pool.

evidence.content_preview: Wyckoff: Spring/Upthrust entry within Accumulation/Distribution phase
